prompt: A candid travel photo of a young woman standing outside a traditional Japanese soft-serve ice cream shop, turning back over her shoulder to smile at the camera. She has shoulder-length dark wavy hair and wears an oversized light blue striped button-up shirt, loose white wide-leg linen pants, and white minimalist sneakers. She carries a cream canvas tote bag. The storefront features wooden frames, Japanese signage, soft-serve cone displays, and a large plastic soft-serve ice cream statue outside. A shop employee wearing a white cap is visible behind the service window. The street is clean with gray pavement, creating an authentic Japanese neighborhood atmosphere. Soft natural overcast daylight, muted colors, cozy travel aesthetic, editorial street photography, realistic textures, high detail, shallow depth of field, 35mm lens, eye-level perspective, ultra-realistic, cinematic, 8K.

promptZh: 一张抓拍的旅行照片，画面中一位 年轻女性 站在一家 日本传统软冰淇淋店 外，回眸对着镜头微笑。她留着齐肩深色波浪卷发，身穿一件 浅蓝色条纹宽松衬衫，搭配宽松的白色阔腿亚麻裤和白色极简运动鞋，肩上背着一个米色帆布袋。店面采用木质框架，挂着日式招牌，摆放着冰淇淋模型，店外还有一个大型塑料软冰淇淋雕像。服务窗口后可以看到一位戴着白色帽子的店员。街道干净，铺着灰色路面，营造出地道的日本社区氛围。柔和的自然阴天光线，色调柔和，温馨的旅行美学，编辑类街头摄影，纹理逼真，细节丰富，浅景深，35mm 镜头，平视视角，超写实，电影感，8K。
